3 tier_id Tier ID Char 2 Medicare Part D formulary tier identifier. This field represents the cost sharing tier in which the product was placed in the sponsor's formulary. This identifier is also a key that links a Part D sponsor's cost sharing tier record to a prescription drug event record via contract ID, plan ID, and tier ID.
4 pre_ICL_tier_drug_type Pre-ICL Tier Drug Type Char 3 Indicates the type of drug (e.g., "Generic", "Brand", etc.) included on the Part D formulary
